diagrams.title: Geometric Dual Construction
diagrams.description: Shows a square with a diagonal, demonstrating how to place vertices in each face and connect adjacent faces
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the step-by-step construction of geometric dual from a planar embedding

diagrams.title: Bridge to Loop Transformation
diagrams.description: A tree edge (bridge) separating the same face on both sides becomes a loop in the dual
diagrams.purpose: Understand how bridges become loops in the geometric dual

diagrams.title: Self-Dual: Wheel Graph W4
diagrams.description: The wheel graph W4 is isomorphic to its geometric dual
diagrams.purpose: Visualize self-dual property and verify W4 ≅ W4*

diagrams.title: Primal-Dual Vertex/Face Relationship
diagrams.description: Shows how degree of dual vertex equals number of edges bounding the corresponding primal face
diagrams.purpose: Understand the relationship between face boundaries and dual vertex degrees
